Rapid Fire Testing
The Framework
RAPID FIRE TESTING
Rapid fire testing is a process we use to validate audiences, offers, and creative using
post engagement objective campaigns. There are three rounds to a rapid fire test:
Round #1: Test personas or audiences
Round #2: Test offer
Round #3: Test creative
DON'T FORGET! There is full step by step instruction on how to roll this out inside the
SOP!
